title: Repository Test Suite Repair: Frozen Digest and Palette Declaration
deviation_notes: Resolves the Open Medium tech-debt row in measure/tech-debt.md: one frozen composition digest mismatch and one palette-declaration mismatch for unused cloth-light / cloth-shadow slots.
Scope is strictly the two repository-wide failures. The Forge ingestion slice is already green (135/135) and must not be regressed or masked.
Does not touch rejected production assets or visual acceptance; this is a mechanical correctness repair.
